text: @UDAKenya goes to Ol Kalau and bribe voters with gas cylinders. Same UDA goes to Nyanza and bribe voters with Ksh200. Luos won't give us rest on these streets. They are all over busy singing tutam. Luos are FOOLS CC @gladyswanga @OpiyoWandayi @JohnMbadiN @DrOburu_O
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are FOOLS' collectively attributes stupidity to the entire Luo community - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @MutembeiTV Address them as Luo goons!it all started in football hooligansm Gor stoning AFC until Baba said no they are in laws!then invasion of Jaramogi Ford Kenya meeting,then Kasararani Men in black, then Bomas Aladwa Elachi incident, Vihiga Sanator,All saints cathedral............
label: hate
rationale: 'Address them as Luo goons' collectively brands the Luo community as political thugs by attributing a series of violent incidents to the group as a whole.

text: @jamesonywoki514 Huskii hawezi kunja ngumi
label: neither
rationale: Appears to be a personal taunt or banter about physical toughness directed at an individual, no ethnic group attacked.

text: Eloi!Baba Amka and see what state funeral has caused your community they are now goons When did we go so low as luos going to attack your own yawa!! #SisiNdioSifuna
label: hate
rationale: 'luos going to attack your own' collectively brands Luos as violent goons, attributing group-wide criminal behavior even while ostensibly lamenting it.

text: -KIKUYUS HATE President William Ruto because HE HAS FIXED KENYAN Economy that KIKUYU PRESIDENT Uhuru Kenyatta DESTROYED 🙂🙂. -IT DOESN'T MATTER THE ELECTION OUTCOME OF 2027, - RUTO MUST RULE KENYA TILL 2032,@WilliamsRuto -AND KIKUYUS WILL DO NOTHING. -BY FIRE OR BULLETS 😊
label: hate
rationale: 'BY FIRE OR BULLETS' paired with 'KIKUYUS WILL DO NOTHING' constitutes a veiled threat of violence framed around ethnic contempt for Kikuyus as a powerless, hating group.

text: @gabrieloguda These BOOMER BULLSHIT we need to get rid off. Also FOOLISH MEN grow old. So he expect all Luos to support the government by force. The same people oppressing and killing Kenyans even the Luos ??? Kenya Kwanza imeua wajaluo wangapi so far ??
label: neither
rationale: Criticism of a named politician/elder's expectation of Luo loyalty and of government violence against Kenyans including Luos - target is leadership and policy, not the Luo community as a group.

text: @KarungoThangwa Watu wa wamunyoro mko used to wamitego's garbage hadi mkiona maendeleo mnaona miracles, nyinyi ni mafala Sana.
label: hate
rationale: 'nyinyi ni mafala sana' collectively attributes stupidity to the Wamunyoro/Murang'a community - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @Kenyans This animal is soo crude MURKOMEN he's known for wayward ways , who listens to him anyway
label: offensive
rationale: 'This animal' and 'crude' are personal insults aimed at named individual politician Murkomen, not his ethnic community.

text: @Paul_Muite Kikuyus are currently the biggest consumers of fake news because they follow a brainless donkey.
label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus are currently the biggest consumers of fake news' collectively attributes credulity and stupidity to the entire Kikuyu community - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @onjolo_kenya Nani alituroga sisi wakale
label: neither
rationale: Rhetorical lament ('who bewitched us elders/old-timers') expressing frustration; no identifiable ethnic attack.

text: @StandardKenya The yamunes greed is on another level they think because one of them is in the highest office they can do anything, they think they own kenya
label: hate
rationale: 'yamunes' (Kalenjin slur) collectively attributed with limitless greed and a sense of ownership over Kenya - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @DrDennisOuma @WilliamsRuto You should be ashamed of yourself. @UDAKenya goes to Ol Kalau and bribe voters with gas cylinders. Same UDA goes to Nyanza and bribe voters with Ksh200. Luos won't give us rest on these streets. They are all over busy singing tutam. Luos are FOOLS
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are FOOLS' collectively attributes stupidity to the entire Luo community - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @Belive_Kinuthia These are Luhyas who are sellouts, they represent nothing in western region and if they represent the political position of western region, let them go to either Bungoma or Kakamega and issue such press statement not in Nairobi. Bure kabisa. WANTAM is Real #RutoMustGo
label: hate
rationale: 'These are Luhyas who are sellouts, they represent nothing' collectively dismisses named Luhya politicians as ethnically treacherous and representative of nothing - NCIC ethnic contempt applied to a community bloc.

text: @makaumully Sifuna is bigger than Kalonzo! Pole. Kambas can't lead.
label: hate
rationale: 'Kambas can't lead' collectively declares the entire Kamba community unfit for leadership - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @KenyanSays Wanaume mnaliaje kukaliwa.African men are docile and losers.Vuruga mtu
label: offensive
rationale: 'African men are docile and losers' is a broad generic insult without specific ethnic, tribal or national-origin targeting sufficient to ground NCIC hate; reads as crude banter about gender passivity.

text: @YaGal_Eunndrio waluhya ndio watafanya kasongo apite siwaamini
label: hate
rationale: 'siwaamini' (I don't trust them) collectively attributes untrustworthiness to Luhyas as the deciding ethnic bloc - NCIC contempt through collective distrust of the community.

text: RT @NeShienu: Kikuyus-Stop your Ego and Selective Amnesia Why Sifuna Why Sifuna, Kalonzo walks Freely in Mt.kenya holding Rallies, Matiangi walks Freely in mt.kenya Holding Rallies, Ruto walks Freely in Mt. Kenya holding Rallies. You're Demonizing Sifuna because Him together with Kangata are Going to take the place of a Chief Tribalist Gachagua. You stand a chance to be isolated by other Kenyans by Cementing Tribalism and Selective Amnesia
label: neither
rationale: Addresses Kikuyus as a political audience urging consistency and warning against tribalism; critical but does not attribute a negative collective characteristic - closer to political appeal than contempt.

text: @tonykaromo Wamunyoro is the chief goon
label: offensive
rationale: 'chief goon' is a personal insult aimed at an individual named Wamunyoro, not transferred onto his ethnic community.

text: @StandardKenya The greed in these yamune nincompoops needs to be studied. They just have an insatiable urge to steal everything. How much is enough?
label: hate
rationale: 'yamune nincompoops' with collective attribution of 'insatiable urge to steal everything' constitutes ethnic contempt against Kalenjins under the NCIC standard.

text: @GibNabson @etadv Theuri is just a polished Gachagua. Just another tribal bigot. To this Orangutan, any president who is not from Morima is bad and must be fought and be removed from power. Makende ya nyani huyu mkabila. He failed terribly during his tenure as president of LSK. SHEEEEEEEENZI....
label: offensive
rationale: 'Orangutan', 'nyani', 'mkabila', 'sheeeenzi' are crude personal insults directed at named individual Theuri; though 'Morima' implies ethnicity, the contempt is transferred onto the individual not his community.

text: @Asamoh_ Wewe Wacha, wajaluo wamepangiwa kazi ya goons wakikuyu wanapewa gas cylinders with full LPG, blankets & sh5OK per household. @SamuelAtandi @gpdkaluma @AnyangNyongo @JunetMohamed
label: hate
rationale: 'wajaluo wamepangiwa kazi ya goons' collectively brands Luos as assigned the role of political thugs - collective attribution of criminal/violent character to the community.

text: @mwalimuken @WehliyeMohamed 22% of mt kenya including me voted for Baba, Luos failed to turn up for him in 2022.. You guys are frauds and hipocrites. Go ahead vote for Ruto and let's see mt Kenya fail as you hope. Atleast we have orengo, Kalonzo, Sifuna, Matiangi who believe in a better Kenya like us
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos failed to turn up... you guys are frauds and hipocrites' collectively attributes dishonesty and bad faith to the Luo community as a group - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: Entitled Kikuyus want Noisemaker Sifuna to take Luo's out of government then pretend to support him 2027 and will obviously not beat Ruto then forced to remain in opposition as they organize themselves for 2032. Unfortunately it's an end of the road for the wicked.
label: hate
rationale: 'Entitled Kikuyus' collectively attributes manipulative scheming to the entire Kikuyu community, framing them as politically wicked and untrustworthy - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: Entitled kikuyus wanted these two fraudsters to drag Luos out of government by challenging Ruto in 2027 but wajinga waliisha Kenya. Entitled kikuyus cannot believe that they have to remain in the opposition until 2032 with impeached Gachagua the fallen mugumo tree.
label: hate
rationale: 'Entitled kikuyus... wajinga waliisha Kenya' collectively brands the Kikuyu community as entitled fools who have exhausted Kenya's patience - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @davidjesse_ No he should stay with kindiki to proof that gema is just kikuyu enslaving other tribes pretending gema is something beneficial to everyone yet they can't support someone from gema who is non kikuyu.
label: hate
rationale: 'gema is just kikuyu enslaving other tribes' collectively accuses Kikuyus of exploiting and subjugating other ethnic communities through their political alliance - NCIC ethnic contempt.
